description: The seismic monitoring network has been suffering from an elevated false-detection rate from the scautopick automatic phase picker. The cause has been identified as broadband cultural noise in the 1–4 Hz frequency band during daytime operations. To filter out this noise while preserving sensitivity to regional M≥3 earthquakes, update the scautopick configuration with a waveform filter of BW(4,4,20), an STA/LTA trigger-on threshold of 3.5, an STA/LTA trigger-off threshold of 1.5, and an AIC picker minimum SNR of 2.0. Save the updated configuration to the scautopick configuration file.
